fields.value: Slip band spacing refined with strain, saturating at ~50 nm for all samples; earlier saturation in finer-grained samples led to earlier microband formation and slight ductility loss.

fields.value: Three-staged strain-hardening behavior: initial drop (stage I) due to glide plane softening, increase (stage II) from slip band refinement and long-range stress, slow decline (stage III) from microband formation.
fields.reason: 证据明确描述了阶段I、II、III的特征
